description: Write a hansl script to analyze the 'food.gdt' dataset by performing OLS regressions of 'food_exp' on 'income' for two subsamples: households with 'income < 15' and households with 'income >= 15'. For each regression, output the slope coefficient, standard error, R-squared, and number of observations (N) to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/subsample_results.txt.
